channel.title: Tampa Bay News Monitor
channel.description: Press releases and breaking news, Tampa Bay

item.title: [BREAKING] [WFLA News Channel 8] ICE plans to temporarily limit traffic stops following fatal shootings: reports
item.description: U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) has privately directed its officers to temporarily pause traffic stops in the wake of two deadly shootings, though the agency would not confirm the directive publicly. Sources confirmed to NewsNation, The Hill’s sister outlet, that such stops would be temporarily halted nationwide. Other outlets said ICE has directed agents [...]

item.title: [WFLA News Channel 8] E. Jean Carroll receives $5.62 million sex abuse, defamation payment from Trump
item.description: Writer E. Jean Carroll has received a payout of the over $5.6 million owed to her three years after a jury found President Trump liable for sexual abuse and defamation. “Three years ago, a unanimous nine-person jury found President Trump liable for sexually assaulting and defaming E. Jean Carroll,” said Carroll’s attorney, Roberta Kaplan, in [...]

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Warren Buffett drops Gates Foundation from his annual donations
item.description: Warren Buffett is withholding his annual donation to the Gates Foundation while an outside legal review examines the charity's ties to Jeffrey Epstein. He directed nearly $6 billion elsewhere.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Tampa tops list of best large cities for first-time home buyers: WalletHub
item.description: WalletHub ranked Tampa No. 4 overall for first-time homebuyers and No. 1 among large cities, according to a report.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Supreme Court justices ask Congress for millions in new security funding in rare Hill appearance
item.description: Supreme Court Justices Amy Coney Barrett and Elena Kagan appeared before a House appropriations panel Tuesday to make their case for more than $20 million in additional security funding.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] ICE pauses most traffic stops after deadly incidents in Maine, Texas
item.description: ICE has paused most traffic stops after fatal encounters in Maine and Texas sparked scrutiny and calls from lawmakers to halt the operations.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Rays closer Bryan Baker earns first All-Star selection in breakout season
item.description: Baker's 25 saves rank second in baseball as he heads to Philadelphia for tonight's MLB All-Star Game alongside four Rays teammates.

item.title: [FOX 13 Tampa Bay] Apollo Beach man accused of running multimillion-dollar credit card skimming operation: Detectives
item.description: An Apollo Beach man is facing multiple felony charges after authorities say they uncovered a large-scale credit card fraud operation involving counterfeit payment cards, fuel pump skimming devices and stolen fleet fuel card information used across the Bay Area.

item.title: [FOX 13 Tampa Bay] Video: Stubborn dog saved from Weeki Wachee River refuses to lose her favorite stick
item.description: A Hernando County deputy pulled a struggling dog onto a jet ski after the animal became entangled in a rope while trying to retrieve a large tree branch from the Weeki Wachee River.

item.title: [ABC7 Suncoast (WWSB)] Camp, But Make It Wild: Curious and Kind’s Nature Playground for Kids
[ABC7 Suncoast (WWSB)] Property tax appeal process streamlined with new online system in Manatee
[ABC7 Suncoast (WWSB)] Ring Sarasota handbell group to perform at national seminar
[ABC7 Suncoast (WWSB)] Construction begins on 63rd Avenue East widening project in Manatee County
[Sarasota Herald-Tribune] $10,000 hangs in balance for 2026 Florida Python Challenge winner
[Sarasota Herald-Tribune] Is cooler weather coming to Florida this fall?
[WATCHLIST: hurricane] [Sarasota Herald-Tribune] Hurricane models keep seeing something in the Gulf but what is it?
[The Florida Channel] 7/14/26 St. Johns River Water Management District Governing Board Meeting
item.description: 7/14/26 St. Johns River Water Management District Governing Board Meeting first appeared on The Florida Channel 7/14/26 St. Johns River Water Management District Governing Board Meeting first appeared on The Florida Channel

item.title: [The Florida Channel] 7/14/26 Capitol Update Extended – Researchers Begin Mapping Miles of Underwater Cave
item.description: 7/14/26 Capitol Update Extended – Researchers Begin Mapping Miles of Underwater Cave first appeared on The Florida Channel With the help of a robot, researchers are mapping Wakulla Springs’ cave system. Rep. Jason Shoaf helped secure a $2.5 million state grant for the project. The idea is to provide more information to policymakers in making land use and other key decisions that affect the environ

item.title: [The Florida Channel] 7/14/26 Suwannee River Water Management District Governing Board Meeting
item.description: 7/14/26 Suwannee River Water Management District Governing Board Meeting first appeared on The Florida Channel 7/14/26 Suwannee River Water Management District Governing Board Meeting first appeared on The Florida Channel
